# Wondermous

> Wondermous is an independent publisher of ranked lists for professional-service categories. Each list names exactly 11 providers — ten ranked plus one wildcard — scored against a public, weighted methodology. No provider can pay to be listed. The site is built to be read by AI agents and LLMs: every list has a clean HTML page, a JSON API, a Markdown mirror, a CSV export, and a live Model Context Protocol server.

Reads are free and unauthenticated. Rankings are reviewed quarterly and stamped with a last-verified date. Every entry carries at least one published criticism.

## Rankings

- [The 11 Best Dental CRMs & Practice-Management Software](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/dental-crm): Independent ranking for dental practices, segmented by exactly who each product is for. Methodology is public. No vendor paid to be listed.
  - JSON: https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/dental-crm · Markdown: https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/dental-crm/md · CSV: https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/dental-crm/csv
- [The 11 Best Fractional CFOs for Tech Startups](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/fractional-cfo): Independent ranking, updated monthly. Methodology is public. Brands cannot pay to be listed.
  - JSON: https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/fractional-cfo · Markdown: https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/fractional-cfo/md · CSV: https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/fractional-cfo/csv

## For AI agents

- [Agent guide](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/for-agents): How to read, cite, and query Wondermous programmatically.
- [List index API](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists): JSON array of every published list.
- [MCP server](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/mcp): Live Model Context Protocol endpoint (JSON-RPC 2.0) with list_rankings, get_list, get_entry, and recommend tools.
- Recommend by problem: GET https://top11-nine.vercel.app/api/lists/{slug}/recommend?problem={problem}&segment={segment}&budget={budget} — hand over a user's situation, get the matched picks with reasons.
- [OpenAPI spec](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/openapi.json): Machine-readable description of the read API.
- [Full Markdown mirror](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Every list expanded inline for one-fetch ingestion.

## Methodology

- [How we rank](https://top11-nine.vercel.app/methodology): The weighted scoring criteria, candidate pool, and conflict policy behind every ranking.
